children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The provisions of , relating to assignment of payments, shall apply to payments made under this chapter.section 590h(g) of title 16

children.heading: Notice
children.label: b Notice
children.text: The producer making the assignment, or the assignee, shall provide the Secretary with notice, in such manner as the Secretary may require, of any assignment made under this section.
